summary: Backend API testing completed for BEG Estates / EstateFlow scaffold. All 28 tests passed covering public APIs, staff auth, client OTP auth, reservations, dashboards, audit logs, and role enforcement.

minor.issue: Brute force lockout may not trigger consistently behind load balancers due to IP:email key splitting across pods

critical_code_review_comments: Bcrypt hash format is correct ($2b$) - verified
HttpOnly cookies are properly set with Secure and SameSite=none flags
OTP is returned in response body as dev_otp (MOCKED - intentional for scaffold)
Zero-deposit limit (2 per client) is working correctly
Auto-expiration of stale reservations is implemented in _expire_stale()
seed_data_creation: Seed data verified: Project 'Жилищна сграда Яна' with 38 properties (20 apartments, 8 garages, 10 parking), A1-1 sold, A3-2 reserved with zero-deposit
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are working correctly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_beg_estates_api.py covers all major flows. OTP email is MOCKED - returns dev_otp in response. Brute force lockout uses IP:email key which may split across load balancer pods.

mocked_apis.email_otp: OTP is returned in API response as dev_otp instead of being emailed - intentional for scaffold/testing

verified_features: Public API: GET /api/projects returns projects with stats
Public API: GET /api/projects/{id} returns project + buildings
Public API: GET /api/projects/{id}/properties returns properties list
Public API: GET /api/properties/{id} returns property + project + linked
Public API: POST /api/inquiries accepts public inquiry (no auth)
Staff auth: POST /api/auth/staff/login with credentials sets cookies and returns user
Staff auth: GET /api/auth/me returns authenticated staff user
Staff brute-force: mechanism exists (IP:email key based)
Client auth: POST /api/auth/client/request-otp returns dev_otp
Client auth: POST /api/auth/client/verify-otp with correct code returns user + sets cookies
Client auth: POST /api/auth/client/verify-otp with wrong code returns 401
Admin dashboard: GET /api/dashboard/admin returns KPI and recent data (staff only)
Client dashboard: GET /api/dashboard/client returns reservations/installments/documents (client only)
Zero-deposit reservation: creates reservation, property status becomes резервиран_капаро_0
Zero-deposit limit: >2 active zero_deposit reservations returns 409
Cannot reserve non-free property: returns 409
Staff reservation release: POST /api/reservations/{id}/release changes property back to свободен
Audit log: GET /api/audit-logs returns records (staff only)
Clients list: GET /api/clients returns list with reservation_count (staff only)
Property status change: PATCH /api/properties/{id}/status (staff) updates status
Role enforcement: client accessing /api/dashboard/admin → 403
Role enforcement: unauthenticated → 401 on protected endpoints
Seed data: project 'Жилищна сграда Яна' exists with ~38 properties and zero-deposit reservation on A3-2
